title: Spaghetti Bolognese
ingredients: Spaghetti (200 g); Ground beef (250 g); Onion (1 chopped); Garlic (2 cloves minced); Tomato sauce (400 ml); Olive oil (1 tbsp); Salt (0.5 tsp); Pepper (0.25 tsp)
directions: Boil spaghetti, sauté onion and garlic, brown beef, add tomato sauce and seasonings, simmer, and serve over spaghetti.

title: Chicken Stir Fry
ingredients: Chicken breast (250 g); Bell pepper (1 sliced); Broccoli (1 cup florets); Soy sauce (2 tbsp); Garlic (2 cloves minced); Ginger (1 tsp grated)
directions: Stir-fry chicken, add vegetables, soy sauce, garlic, and ginger. Cook until tender and serve with rice.

title: Beef Tacos
ingredients: Ground beef (250 g); Taco seasoning (1 tbsp); Tortillas (4); Lettuce (0.5 cup shredded); Cheese (0.5 cup grated); Salsa (3 tbsp)
directions: Cook beef with seasoning, warm tortillas, and assemble with lettuce, cheese, and salsa.

title: Vegetable Curry
ingredients: Potatoes (2 diced); Carrots (2 sliced); Cauliflower (1 cup florets); Curry paste (2 tbsp); Coconut milk (400 ml)
directions: Cook vegetables with curry paste and coconut milk; simmer until thick and serve with rice.

title: Salmon with Rice
ingredients: Salmon fillet (200 g); Rice (1 cup); Lemon juice (1 tbsp); Olive oil (1 tbsp); Salt (0.25 tsp)
directions: Season salmon and bake until done; cook rice and serve together.

title: Beef Stew
ingredients: Beef chunks (300 g); Carrots (2 chopped); Potatoes (2 diced); Onion (1 chopped); Beef broth (500 ml)
directions: Brown beef, add vegetables and broth, simmer 1–2 hours until tender.

title: Chicken Alfredo
ingredients: Chicken breast (200 g); Pasta (200 g); Cream (150 ml); Parmesan (50 g grated); Garlic (1 clove minced)
directions: Cook pasta and chicken, prepare creamy Alfredo sauce, combine and serve.

title: Chili Con Carne
ingredients: Ground beef (300 g); Kidney beans (1 can); Diced tomatoes (400 g); Chili powder (1 tbsp); Onion (1 chopped)
directions: Cook beef, add beans, tomatoes, spices, and simmer until thick.

title: Shrimp Pasta
ingredients: Shrimp (200 g); Pasta (200 g); Garlic (2 cloves minced); Butter (1 tbsp); Parsley (1 tbsp chopped)
directions: Cook pasta, sauté shrimp with garlic and butter, combine and serve.

title: Lasagna
ingredients: Lasagna sheets (6); Ground beef (250 g); Tomato sauce (400 ml); Ricotta (200 g); Mozzarella (150 g grated)
directions: Layer meat sauce, ricotta, mozzarella, and pasta sheets; bake until bubbly.

title: Teriyaki Chicken Bowl
ingredients: Chicken thighs (250 g); Teriyaki sauce (3 tbsp); Rice (1 cup); Broccoli (1 cup florets); Sesame seeds (1 tsp)
directions: Cook chicken with teriyaki sauce, steam broccoli, and serve over rice with sesame seeds.

title: Lemon Garlic Chicken
ingredients: Chicken breast (250 g); Lemon juice (2 tbsp); Garlic (3 cloves minced); Olive oil (1 tbsp); Thyme (1 tsp)
directions: Marinate chicken in lemon, garlic, and thyme, then bake until cooked through.

title: Stuffed Peppers
ingredients: Bell peppers (3); Ground beef (200 g); Rice (1 cup cooked); Tomato sauce (200 ml); Cheese (50 g grated)
directions: Stuff peppers with beef, rice, and sauce, top with cheese, and bake until tender.

title: Baked Ziti
ingredients: Ziti pasta (200 g); Tomato sauce (300 ml); Mozzarella (100 g grated); Ricotta (100 g); Parmesan (30 g grated)
directions: Mix cooked ziti with sauces and cheeses, then bake until golden.

title: Turkey Meatballs with Pasta
ingredients: Ground turkey (250 g); Breadcrumbs (50 g); Egg (1); Pasta (200 g); Tomato sauce (300 ml)
directions: Form meatballs, bake or fry, then serve with pasta and tomato sauce.

title: BBQ Chicken Drumsticks
ingredients: Chicken drumsticks (4); BBQ sauce (4 tbsp); Paprika (1 tsp); Garlic powder (1 tsp)
directions: Season drumsticks, coat with BBQ sauce, and bake until cooked and caramelized.

title: Tuna Casserole
ingredients: Pasta (200 g); Canned tuna (1 can); Peas (0.5 cup); Cream of mushroom soup (200 ml); Cheese (50 g grated)
directions: Mix ingredients, place in baking dish, top with cheese, and bake until bubbly.

title: Sausage and Peppers
ingredients: Italian sausage (250 g); Bell peppers (2 sliced); Onion (1 sliced); Olive oil (1 tbsp)
directions: Cook sausage, then sauté peppers and onions together until soft; serve with bread or pasta.

title: Pesto Pasta
ingredients: Pasta (200 g); Basil pesto (3 tbsp); Cherry tomatoes (0.5 cup halved); Parmesan (30 g grated)
directions: Toss cooked pasta with pesto and tomatoes, then sprinkle with parmesan.

title: Chicken Fajitas
ingredients: Chicken breast (250 g); Bell peppers (2 sliced); Onion (1 sliced); Fajita seasoning (1 tbsp); Tortillas (4)
directions: Cook chicken with seasoning, sauté peppers and onions, and serve in warm tortillas.
